code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
end

fn byte_of(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b
  when None
    -1
  end
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut line_start = 0
mut last_start = -1
mut last_end = 0
mut i = 0
while i <= n
  mut is_end = false
  if i == n
    is_end = true
  else if byte_of(input, i) == 10
    is_end = true
  end
  if is_end
    let e = i
    mut ee = e
    mut stop = false
    while ee > line_start and not stop
      let b = byte_of(input, ee - 1)
      if is_ws(b)
        ee = ee - 1
      else
        stop = true
      end
    end
    if ee > line_start
      last_start = line_start
      last_end = e
    end
    line_start = i + 1
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if last_start < 0
  println("(none)")
else
  println(string.substring(input, last_start, last_end))
end
